periods.name: Overnight
periods.detailed_forecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms. Cloudy, with a low around 74. East wind around 6 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

periods.name: Wednesday
periods.detailed_forecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms before 2pm, then a slight chance of showers and thunderstorms between 2pm and 5pm. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 82. East wind 7 to 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

periods.name: Wednesday Night
periods.detailed_forecast: Mostly cloudy, with a low around 74. Southeast wind 6 to 10 mph.

periods.name: Thursday
periods.short_forecast: Partly Sunny then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
periods.detailed_forecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms after 2pm. Partly sunny, with a high near 92. South wind around 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.
